location: Science City of Muñoz, Nueva Ecija
summary: Led a 5-member team building a web-based inventory and logging system that replaced the company's outdated manual processes.
body: As lead developer, I led a 5-member development team in creating a web-based inventory and logging system for MAConglomo, optimizing business processes that previously ran on outdated systems.
I designed the system back-end and implemented secure user authentication, admin dashboards, and medicine stock tracking modules using PHP, MySQL, and Bootstrap.

Throughout the engagement I applied software engineering principles — Agile methodology, version control, and modular system design — and coordinated client feedback sessions and iterative testing to keep deliverables functional and user-centered.
highlights: Led a 5-member development team as lead developer
Designed the back-end: secure auth, admin dashboards, medicine stock tracking
Ran Agile iterations with client feedback sessions and iterative testing
